title: Citrus Mozzaventure
description: A citrusy, chewy, adventurous Filipino dish featuring mozzarella in a dairy-free friendly version.

ingredients.name: Mozzarella
ingredients.notes: Use dairy-free mozzarella for the vegan version.

ingredients.name: Kalamansi (Philippine Pitta Berry or Lime)
ingredients.notes: Juice the kalamansi for zest and flavor.

ingredients.name: Coconut Milk
ingredients.notes: For poaching the mozzarella in a dairy-free version.

ingredients.name: Cornstarch or Arrowroot Powder
ingredients.notes: Stabilizer for the coconut milk glaze.

instructions: Combine kalamansi juice, mint leaves, and coconut milk in a small saucepan. Bring to a simmer and cook until reduced by half (about 5 minutes). Remove from heat.
Prepare mozzarella: slice it into rounds or balls about the size of a golf ball. If not using dairy-free mozzarella, lightly coat slices in cornstarch or arrowroot powder before poaching.
For poaching the mozzarella, place slices in the reduced kalamansi sauce and cook for 1-2 minutes until heated through but still chewy. Remove from heat immediately to avoid overcooking.
Arrange jicama pieces on a serving plate. Place each poached mozzarella slice on top of the jicama, garnishing with fresh mint leaves.
